text.title: continuous-discovery Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for continuous-discovery as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Discovery runs every week but roadmap decisions never change in response to findings.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Discovery without a feedback loop into the roadmap is ceremony. If the biweekly diff never produces a proposed change, either the discovery is not surfacing real signals or the roadmap is being protected from evidence.

failure-mode.description: Weekly interviews recruit only engaged, active users.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Active users are not representative of the full user base. Passive users and at-risk churners have different problems. Run a quarterly sample-bias audit and rotate recruitment criteria to include users with low recent activity.

failure-mode.description: Theme vocabulary grows without governance — new theme names appear each week for the same underlying problem.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Renaming destroys longitudinal analysis. You cannot track whether "activation friction" is improving if it was called "onboarding issues" last month. Lock the vocabulary and require approval for changes.

failure-mode.description: LLM synthesis is the only artifact — raw transcripts and verbatim quotes are discarded.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Summaries lose tone, nuance, and edge cases. When a decision is challenged, "the LLM said users want X" is not defensible. The verbatim is the source of truth; the summary is a navigation aid.

failure-mode.description: Discovery cadence is calendar-optional and skips when a sprint is busy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Discovery always loses to feature pressure if it is optional. Schedule it as non-negotiable recurring blocks and automate the data ingestion steps so the weekly review cannot be skipped without explicit team decision.
